chatMessages.text: Tell me what kind of workflow you'd like to build! I'll ask clarifying questions to nail down the requirements — once we've got enough detail, click "Generate Workflow" on the right to produce a draft JSON config, which you can then Publish.

props.placeholder: Describe the workflow you want — a requirements summary will build up here as we chat.

props.emptyMessage: Once you click Generate Workflow, a draft will appear here.

value.text: ~{ ($r := $floor($random()*5); ['Got it, thinking it through…','One moment, let me take a look…','On it — let me consider that…','Give me a second to think about that…','Working on it…'][$r]) }
Please generate the complete workflow configuration now.
